3125970.name: ECHO OF FEAR: Vol.1 Night Visit
3125970.description:
THE FIRST EPISODE IS FREE TO PLAY


ECHO OF FEAR is a psychological horror game where you play as a detective who receives a box containing 6 mysterious videotapes. Each tape represents a separate story connected by a common plot. The plot is based on the Cthulhu myths by H.P. Lovecraft.
You are watching the first part of the ECHO OF FEAR anthology.

ECHO OF FEAR: Vol.1 Night Visit

In the first episode of "ECHO OF FEAR," the detective watches a videotape titled "Night Visit." You play as Louis Langridge, who decides to take a shortcut to the city of Arkham via a country road. But when a rainstorm begins, he seeks shelter in a lonely house. What could go wrong?

Gameplay

This game is a first-person narrative walking simulator with item carrying and exploration mechanics.

Key Features

    []Atmospheric environment and photorealistic graphics.[]Each episode's story is part of a larger puzzle.[]VHS movie and old film atmosphere.[]Spatial puzzles.
3125970.supported_languages:
英语, 俄语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
